name: Mexican Cheese Torta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup red pepper, seeded and chopped fine
1/4 cup jalapeno peppers (or less, to taste), chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, pulse the ingredients until just holding together.
2. Remove mixture from processor.
3. Spoon into a 4-cup bowl lined with plastic wrap.
4. Fill the bowl and pat the mixture flat.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for at least 4 hours or overnight.
6. To unmold, remove plastic wrap from top of bowl.
7. Place serving platter over top of bowl and gently turn both completely over.
8. Remove bowl and gently peel off plastic wrap.
9. Garnish with chopped cilantro or parsley.
10. Arrange multicolored tortilla chips around the mold.
